If your phone isn’t ringing as often as you’d like, your website may be part of the problem. Many Boston business owners assume they need more website traffic to generate more leads. While traffic is certainly important, the reality is that many potential customers leave a website long before they ever decide to call, email, or fill out a contact form.
At RooSites Web Development, we’ve reviewed hundreds of websites for businesses throughout Boston and Massachusetts. One pattern appears again and again: businesses are losing customers before they ever have a chance to start a conversation.
Here are some of the most common reasons why.
https://roosites.com/why-boston-businesses-lose-customers-before-they-ever-pick-up-the-phone/
